---
title: "Visual Vocabulary"
format: html
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<a href="https://officenationalstatistics.sharepoint.com/sites/digpub/DigPub/Forms/AllItems.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2Fdigpub%2FDigPub%2FPICI%2FImprove%20%2D%20Data%20vis%2FData%20vis%20training%2FONS%20charts%20cheat%20sheet%20%2D%20Nov%202025%2Epdf&parent=%2Fsites%2Fdigpub%2FDigPub%2FPICI%2FImprove%20%2D%20Data%20vis%2FData%20vis%20training"  class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/resources_thumbnails/cheatsheet.png" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">ONS Charts cheat sheet</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">Choose the right chart type to show the 
insights in your data.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

<a href="https://service-manual.ons.gov.uk/data-visualisation" class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/resources_thumbnails/servicemanual.png" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">Service manual</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">Guidance for creating charts and tables and best practice for using colour in your work.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<a href="https://github.com/ONSvisual/Charts" class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/resources_thumbnails/charts.png" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">Charts</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">ONS chart components</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>

:::

:::



<div id="footer">
You can contact us at [digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk](mailto:digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk) and we will set up a consultation to see how we can best support you.</div>
